sourcesContent:
// src/data/articles.js
// Variables alignées avec l'entité Article.java et Produit.java du backend Spring Boot
// API : GET /api/articles

// Vendeurs (entité Vendeur.java — table vendors)
export const VENDORS = [
  { id: 1, vendorCode: 'V001', vendorName: 'TechSupply Inc.',  contactEmail: 'contact@techsupply.com',  phone: '514-555-1001' },
  { id: 2, vendorCode: 'V002', vendorName: 'Techniques',       contactEmail: 'info@techniques.com',     phone: '514-555-1002' },
  { id: 3, vendorCode: 'V003', vendorName: 'Bureau Plus',      contactEmail: 'ventes@bureauplus.com',   phone: '418-555-1003' },
  { id: 4, vendorCode: 'V004', vendorName: 'Informatix',       contactEmail: 'sales@informatix.com',    phone: '450-555-1004' },
  { id: 5, vendorCode: 'V005', vendorName: 'MobilierPro',      contactEmail: 'pro@mobilierpro.com',     phone: '819-555-1005' },
  { id: 6, vendorCode: 'V006', vendorName: 'AccessParts',      contactEmail: 'parts@accessparts.com',   phone: '514-555-1006' },
  { id: 7, vendorCode: 'V007', vendorName: 'GlobalTech',       contactEmail: 'global@globaltech.com',   phone: '438-555-1007' },
  { id: 8, vendorCode: 'V008', vendorName: 'NordEquip',        contactEmail: 'nord@nordequip.com',      phone: '418-555-1008' },
];

// Producteurs (entité Produit.java — table produits)
export const PRODUCTEURS = [
  { id: 1, producerCode: 'P001', producerName: 'TechSupply Inc.', contactEmail: 'contact@techsupply.com', phone: '514-555-1001' },
  { id: 2, producerCode: 'P002', producerName: 'MobilierPro',     contactEmail: 'pro@mobilierpro.com',    phone: '819-555-1005' },
  { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts',     contactEmail: 'parts@accessparts.com',  phone: '514-555-1006' },
];

// Articles (entité Article.java — table articles)
export const ARTICLES = [
  {
    id: 1,
    articleCode:  'A001',
    articleName:  'Laptop Pro 15"',
    description:  'Ordinateur portable haute performance',
    price:        1299.00,   // listPrice
    stock:        24,        // onHand
    onOrder:      5,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         950.00,
    listPrice:    1299.00,
    producteur:   { id: 1, producerCode: 'P001', producerName: 'TechSupply Inc.' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    articleCode:  'A002',
    articleName:  'Souris sans fil',
    description:  'Souris ergonomique sans fil',
    price:        34.99,
    stock:        2,
    onOrder:      20,
    backordered:  'Yes',
    cost:         18.00,
    listPrice:    34.99,
    producteur:   { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    articleCode:  'A003',
    articleName:  'Clavier mécanique',
    description:  'Clavier mécanique rétroéclairé',
    price:        89.50,
    stock:        15,
    onOrder:      0,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         55.00,
    listPrice:    89.50,
    producteur:   { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    articleCode:  'A004',
    articleName:  'Écran 27" 4K',
    description:  'Moniteur 4K Ultra HD 27 pouces',
    price:        549.00,
    stock:        8,
    onOrder:      3,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         380.00,
    listPrice:    549.00,
    producteur:   { id: 1, producerCode: 'P001', producerName: 'TechSupply Inc.' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    articleCode:  'A005',
    articleName:  'Webcam HD 1080p',
    description:  'Caméra web Full HD avec micro intégré',
    price:        79.99,
    stock:        0,
    onOrder:      10,
    backordered:  'Yes',
    cost:         45.00,
    listPrice:    79.99,
    producteur:   { id: 1, producerCode: 'P001', producerName: 'TechSupply Inc.' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    articleCode:  'A006',
    articleName:  'Casque audio BT',
    description:  'Casque Bluetooth sans fil haute fidélité',
    price:        149.00,
    stock:        11,
    onOrder:      0,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         90.00,
    listPrice:    149.00,
    producteur:   { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts' },
    categorie:    'Électronique',
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    articleCode:  'A007',
    articleName:  'Hub USB-C 7 ports',
    description:  'Concentrateur USB-C multiport',
    price:        45.00,
    stock:        30,
    onOrder:      0,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         22.00,
    listPrice:    45.00,
    producteur:   { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts' },
    categorie:    'Accessoires',
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    articleCode:  'A008',
    articleName:  'Chaise ergonomique',
    description:  'Chaise de bureau ergonomique réglable',
    price:        399.00,
    stock:        3,
    onOrder:      5,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         250.00,
    listPrice:    399.00,
    producteur:   { id: 2, producerCode: 'P002', producerName: 'MobilierPro' },
    categorie:    'Mobilier',
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    articleCode:  'A009',
    articleName:  'Bureau debout',
    description:  'Bureau assis-debout électrique',
    price:        599.00,
    stock:        0,
    onOrder:      2,
    backordered:  'Yes',
    cost:         380.00,
    listPrice:    599.00,
    producteur:   { id: 2, producerCode: 'P002', producerName: 'MobilierPro' },
    categorie:    'Mobilier',
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    articleCode:  'A010',
    articleName:  'Lampe de bureau LED',
    description:  'Lampe LED à intensité variable',
    price:        59.99,
    stock:        18,
    onOrder:      0,
    backordered:  'No',
    cost:         32.00,
    listPrice:    59.99,
    producteur:   { id: 3, producerCode: 'P003', producerName: 'AccessParts' },
    categorie:    'Accessoires',
  },
];
